body_preview: - Trajectory: `transcript_only_failed_tool_count=2` — 2 tool failures found in transcripts but absent from state events - Trajectory: `failed_tool_summary.bash_tool_error=2` — 2 bash commands failed during implementation - Trajectory graph-derived pressure #5: "Reconcile transcript-only tool failures — Recent transcripts contained failed tool actions absent
expected_evidence: After deployment, `yyds state graph hotspots` shows bash ToolCallFailed events in the event stream Future trajectory reports `transcript_only_failed_tool_count=0` for sessions after this lands State capture coverage remains at 1.0 (no regression) Implementation Notes: The StreamingBashTool returns stdout/stderr/exit_code via a ToolOutput. title: Wire bash tool failures into state events to close transcript-only gap
